EventDescriptions.EventDescription: There was a passage through the checkpoint "{subject.name}" with button
At the checkpoint "{subject.name}" occurred entrance of employee "{object.name}" with key {object.value}
At the checkpoint "{subject.name}" key {object.value} attached to the output by officer "{object.name}"
At the checkpoint "{subject.name}" occurred visitor's exit with key {object.value} with card reader
At the checkpoint "{subject.name}" officer "{object.name}" with key {object.value} left the door open
At the checkpoint "{subject.name}" occurred exit of employee "{object.name}" with key {object.value}
At the checkpoint "{subject.name}" attached key {object.value} to the input by employee "{object.name}"
At the checkpoint "{subject.name}" visitor with key {object.value} refused entry
At the checkpoint "{subject.name}" the passage is closed
At the checkpoint "{subject.name}" output is not allowed for visitors with key {object.value} who made a passage in the wrong direction
